violations.text: An allergy statement is lacking on the menus. PIC will add statement before printing menus New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The walk-in refrigerator was observed unable to maintain a temperature of 41 or less. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The sink used for food preparation and ice bins is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. Air gap guidance provided. New Violation. Correct By: 10/06/2025
